note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Bearer token: admin/integration token from /V1/integration/admin/token, or OAuth1.0a for integrations, or customer token.

expectedFailureResponseShape.message: The consumer isn't authorized to access %resources.

commonIntegrationFailure: 401 with 'consumer is not authorized' when the integration lacks the required ACL resource, or token expired; searchCriteria query syntax errors return 400.
preventionRule: Grant the integration the exact ACL resources it calls; refresh bearer tokens before expiry; URL-encode searchCriteria parameters.
